title: Salient Highlights of JUIT
content: Salient Highlights of JUIT Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, District Solan, H.P established in 2002 by Act No 14 of 2002 vide Extraordinary Gazette Notification of the Govt of Himachal Accreditations and Support: Highlights of JUIT The First State Private University of Himachal Pradesh and have privilege to have Honorable Governor of H.P its Chancellor. The university has a Technology Incubation and Entrepreneurship Development Cell (TIEDC) financed under the Chief Minister's start-up schemes, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh. Scopus H-Index of University 87, WoS H-index 74 93 Research Grants from various Government Agencies (DBT/CSIR/DST/DRDO/HIMCOSTE) worth 24.37 Crores. https://www.juit.ac.in/attachments/ResearchProjectsatJUIT.pdf Focus on creativity and innovation is hallmark of JUIT. It has more than 60 granted /published Patents to its credit. https://www.juit.ac.in/patent-status-ipr More than 4557 Research Publications and 141 Books. https://www.juit.ac.in/jpubdb/ Excellent placement record of students with reputed multinationals like Amazon, Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro etc. Highest package 50 LPA with Google in 2024. Selected students study 8th semester with internship at Universities of Florida, Nebraska, and South Dakota, USA. Experienced faculty with good academic experience and Doctorates from reputed universities like IITs/NITs and International Universities. 30 International Conferences, 236 invited talks, 85 national workshops organized with around 8578+ delegates from around the world participating. Academic Curricula is supported by NPTEL, Virtual Lab, e-Yantra Lab, Spoken Tutorial, IOT, IEEE Chapter, Computer Society of India Chapter. Fully networked, vibrant, green and smart residential campus radiating youth power in multidimensional fields. The 13 Boys and One Girls hostel house approx 1800 students. The academic curriculum and the co curricular activities are a perfect blend for total personality development of a student. The Jaypee Youth Club (JYC) is an active student body which conducts a host of co-curricular, sports, cultural and technical activities for the students. NCC for Girls and Boys adds an avenue for personality development of students. 30 percent concession in Tuition Fees for wards of serving and retired armed forces & Para Military Force personnel in UG admissions. Additional 5 % (35 percent) to wards of war widows. Registrar: Brigadier RK Sharma, SM (Retd.) Vice Chancellor: Prof. Rajendra Kumar Sharma
